$what_the_specified_permissions_are_for.tabs: Obtaining the current tab URL to check whether protection is enabled for the active site in the popup
$what_the_specified_permissions_are_for.alarms: Scheduling profile refresh and other periodic maintenance tasks
$what_the_specified_permissions_are_for.storage: Persisting Bullshield settings, the active profile, and saved history
$what_the_specified_permissions_are_for.scripting: Injecting runtime protection code into pages at the correct time
$what_the_specified_permissions_are_for.declarativeNetRequest: Aligning outgoing request headers with the active browser profile
$what_the_specified_permissions_are_for.cookies: Passing the active profile payload into the page synchronously when required
$what_the_specified_permissions_are_for.webNavigation: Preparing profile payloads before page scripts execute
$what_the_specified_permissions_are_for.debugger: Applying browser-level profile overrides for early, worker, and service-worker-related detection paths
